name: Doofinder
description: Doofinder — E-commerce search API with autocomplete, faceted search, and product recommendations.

seo.title: Doofinder — Search / Recommendations API
seo.meta_description: Doofinder: Doofinder — E-commerce search API with autocomplete, faceted search, and product recommendations.

when_to_use: Autocomplete and instant search for e-commerce store
Faceted filtering for product catalog navigation
Product recommendations based on search behavior
Search relevance tuning for merchandising goals
Analytics on zero-result searches to improve catalog

pros: Easy plug-and-play install for Shopify, WooCommerce, Magento
Autocomplete, facets, and banners without custom dev
AI-powered ranking improves with shop traffic
cons: Free tier is limited; pricing scales by monthly searches
Less extensible than Algolia for bespoke UIs
Merchandising controls feel basic for large catalogs
Occasional indexing delays on product updates
review.verdict: Good value e-commerce search for SMBs who want fast install over deep customization or enterprise merchandising.
review.best_for: Small and mid-size Shopify or WooCommerce stores wanting better default search fast.
review.not_for: Enterprise retailers with complex merchandising or headless custom storefronts.
